## Summary

Fixes all remaining workbench layout issues:

1. **Search Queue + Queue pill** — `flex-nowrap` + `whitespace-nowrap` forces them onto the exact same row, `justify-between` pushes label left and pill right
2. **Title "g" descenders** — header `py-3`, h1 `pb-1` + `lineHeight: 1.8` ensures full descender visibility
3. **Reset Queue position** — `right-[614px]` aligned directly left of TrustedPath with 12px gap
4. **Row spacing** — Diagnosis & Guardrails row compressed (`py-0.5`, `text-[9px]`), task title row has `pt-6` creating wide visible gap between rows 2 and 3
5. **Queue counter** — proper em-space after "Queue" text

## Scope

- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompactV3.tsx` — sidebar, detail header
- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — Reset Queue positioning

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — pure UI layout.
